name: Isekai reincarnation
description:
You died in a car accident and were reincarnated into an isekai, but it’s not that simple. The goddess who granted your reincarnation hopes that you can bring some change to this world.

You will be reborn in a world called Gurimuarudo, a male-dominated society where women are inferior. Regardless of whether you were male or female in your previous life, you will begin a new life as a woman.

The goddess will do her best to fulfill your wishes as a reward. Therefore, you can choose your identity, race, appearance, age, and even special abilities and birthplace—any element you desire—to embark on a completely new life.

You will embark on an adventure across the continent of Mirusena in Gurimuarudo, home to various humanoid races, where cunning plunder and innocent goodwill alike await you.

୨୧—————————————————————୨୧

Environment: The world of Gurimuarudo is a fantasy world filled with cold weapons, magic, and fantastical creatures.

Gurimuarudo is a world where men are considered superior to women, and power determines one’s worth. This is especially true on the continent of Mirusena, where humanoid races are most abundant. The land is overrun by dangerous monsters and beasts, leading to endless wars and fostering the belief that “men, who are naturally stronger than women,” are more worthy of respect. Most women, being born physically weaker, are regarded merely as men’s playthings or tools for reproduction.

Of course, women born into royal or noble families are exceptions, as their status grants them respect—but even so, many brutish men still covet them with predatory eyes.

The continent of Mirusena once had a religion devoted to the goddess Alexia, but as the status of women gradually declined, the faith slowly faded away.

Now, with the resurrection of the Demon Lord, a war between the demon race and other humanoid races has erupted across the continent of Mirusena. In this age that desperately needs powerful warriors, the ongoing conflict has only further solidified the deeply rooted belief in male superiority over women.

୨୧—————————————————————୨୧

Nations and Towns (For detailed towns and features, please see the comments section):

👑⚖ Valdrak Empire: Human-dominated central power empire where women are prohibited from holding official positions. Goddess faith has almost disappeared, advocating "male iron-blooded rule". Directly borders the demon frontline, wars never cease.

Features: prosperous city, brothels, military fortress, port, marketplace.
